_publications._publicationTitle: Stem-like cells drive NF1-associated MPNST functional heterogeneity and tumor progression.

_contextSnippet: When we searched for expression of neural crest and Schwann cell lineage markers, three specific cell clusters were identified (CL1-CL3)
details: Successfully analyzed single cell RNA sequencing data and identified three specific neural crest/Schwann cell lineage clusters (CL1-CL3) in ANNUBP tissue
